mapper.sql: file_id, owner_id, scene, storage_type, bucket, object_key, original_filename, file_ext, mime_type, file_size, etag, width, height, duration_ms, file_status, audit_status, access_level, uploaded_at, bound_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM bluenote_file.file_object WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT FROM bluenote_file.file_object WHERE deleted = 0 AND file_id IN
#{fileId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_file.file_object SET file_status = 'UPLOADED', etag = #{etag}, file_size = #{fileSize}, uploaded_at = #{uploadedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND file_status = 'INIT' AND deleted = 0

UPDATE bluenote_file.file_object SET file_status = 'BOUND', bound_at = COALESCE(bound_at, #{boundAt}), updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE file_id = #{fileId} AND file_status IN ('UPLOADED', 'BOUND') AND deleted = 0
